API Versioning Strategy: The platform will adopt URL path versioning (/api/v1/, /api/v2/) as the primary versioning mechanism, balancing explicitness with cacheability. Each major version is supported for a minimum of 18 months after the successor version reaches general availability, giving clients adequate migration time. Deprecation notices are communicated via response headers (Deprecation and Sunset) and developer portal announcements at least 90 days in advance. Minor, backward-compatible changes are added to the existing version without a new version number.
